headline: A cluster of data-resilience techniques entered as new this quarter while AI agent and safety pressures mounted across institutions.
body: The standout shift is a fresh cluster of infrastructure-resilience techniques entering together: data backup, immutability, disaster recovery, and ransomware protection, alongside agent-oriented new entrants like the doer-judge framework, role confusion, and primitive-action decomposition. Established techniques including prompt context, context window optimization, AI-assisted development, the PIV Loop, cache hit rate, and encrypted reasoning all lagged, while tool calling and weight perturbation weakened. On the institutional side, the Broward School Board paused an educator AI rollout over privacy and security concerns, and the U.S. government pressed Meta to submit to AI reviews [0][7]. Tech stocks slumped on AI bubble fears even as MoEngage bet on millions of marketing AI agents [2][6].

cited_items.title: Broward School Board pauses rollout of AI platform for educators amid privacy and security concerns - CBS News
Tech stocks slump as AI bubble fears loom
India’s MoEngage bets that the future of marketing is millions of AI agents
U.S. Presses Meta to Agree to A.I. Reviews as Security Concerns Rise - The New York Times
